pet_notes: Compact friendly woodland data-sprite for a coding-and-forest-plotting workspace: moss-green leaf hood, warm bark-brown body, tiny chart-leaf satchel, bright curious eyes, calm focused helper energy, no text or logos.
style_notes: clean non-pixel sticker mascot, thick readable outline, simple shapes, warm forest palette with small data-visualization cue, readable at 192x208
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `sticker`: Polished sticker mascot with bold clean shapes, crisp outline, flat colors, and minimal highlight detail. User style notes: clean non-pixel sticker mascot, thick readable outline, simple shapes, warm forest palette with small data-visualization cue, readable at 192x208.
pet_safe_style: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
